greeting.speaker: Agent Harlow
greeting.text: Cid. Good afternoon. Mind if I take a few minutes of your time?

choices.text: Sure. What can I do for you?
You were in here this morning.

sure.speaker: Agent Harlow
sure.text: I appreciate that. I'm doing a wellness study. Longitudinal. Nothing invasive.

depends.speaker: Agent Harlow
depends.text: Nothing much. A few questions. A short evaluation. Standard federal wellness protocol.

this_morning.speaker: Agent Harlow
this_morning.text: I did. You make a good cup of coffee. I find myself back here.

setup.speaker: Agent Harlow
setup.text: We've been tracking cognitive resilience in small community populations. You fit the profile nicely.

choices.text: Alright. What do you need from me?

what_kind.speaker: Agent Harlow
what_kind.text: Response time. Pattern recognition. A bit of manual coordination. Nothing you haven't done before.

not_interested.speaker: Agent Harlow
not_interested.text: Of course. Participation is entirely voluntary. Although I think you might find it... familiar.

alright.speaker: Agent Harlow
alright.text: Wonderful. We'll keep it brief. I just need you to run through a short sequence.

codeword_1.speaker: Agent Harlow
codeword_1.text: When you're ready, I'd like you to focus. The first sequence keyword is: Cascade.

codeword_response.speaker: Agent Harlow
codeword_response.text: Take your time. There's no wrong answer. Just let your instincts guide you.

choices.text: That's a strange word for a wellness test.
I don't think I want to do this.

response_comply.speaker: Agent Harlow
response_comply.text: Good. Very good. We'll continue this evening. Get some rest in the meantime.

response_question.speaker: Agent Harlow
response_question.text: It's a neutral stimulus. We use them to baseline cognitive response. Nothing more.

response_refuse.speaker: Agent Harlow
response_refuse.text: That's perfectly fine. The offer stands. I'll be around.

farewell.speaker: Agent Harlow
farewell.text: Thank you for your time Cid. This town is lucky to have someone like you.

greeting_return.speaker: Agent Harlow
greeting_return.text: We'll pick up tonight. Don't overthink it.
